titleStmt.title: SII 27.162: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 162. (A.R. No. 354 of 1934-35.) HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: Southern door-way into the central shrine of Pampāpati temple.

This record registers a gift of several villages (the names of which are enumerated), free of taxes, to god Virūpākshdēva for worship and offerings and conducting several festivals, by the king for the merit off his father Narasaṇanāyaka-oḍeya and mother Nāgājī. The gift was made on the occasion of a solar eclipse.

It is dated Śaka 1435, Śrīmukha, Chaitra śu. 5. In the absence of the weekday the deatails cannot be verified. But a solar eclipse did occur five days earlier, i.e., on 1513 A.D., March 7, Monday on which day the gift was actually made. The record mifght have been engraved five days later, on 1513 A.D., March 12.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī virūpākṣa dēvaru
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁ
dracāmara cāravē . trailōkya na
garāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya
śambhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyu
dyaya śālivāhana(hana) ṣakavaruṣa
1435 neya śrīmakha saṁvachara
caitra śu 5 śrīmatu śrīmannahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrī vīra kruṣṇadēva mahā
rāyarū śrī virūpākṣa dēvarige Ā
mrutapaḍi naivēdyakū Aṁgaraṁgavayi
bhōga nityanayimitike Ā cayi
tra māsada rathōtsaha makara saṁkrāṁ
tiya rathōtsaha māsōtsaha pakṣō
tsaha saṁvatsarōtsaha dīpārā
dhane paṁcaparva modalāda puṁṇya
tithigaḷu mahāpūjegaḷigū sa
marpisidu śrīkruṣṇarāya mahā
rāyara paṭṭadalu biṭṭa siṁginā
yakanagahaḷi grāma 1 prāku salu
va grāmagaḷū kāḷagaṭeya grā 1
danāyaka purada grāma 1 rāma
caṁdrāpurada grāma 1 kaṁḍu
malinakupe grāma 1 Āyāḍi grā 1
hoṁnāpurada grāma 1 vijaya ni
ku purada grāma 1 mūḍa nāḍa
grāmagaḷū daṁmūra grāma 1 bha
yirava dēvana haḷiya grāma 1 kala
kaṁbhada grāma 1 gōna hāḷa grā 1
duṁḍeganūra grāma . soḍa rā
grāma 1 mudigeṟeya grāma 1
vritti māṁnya grāmagaḷū sahā

sakala birāḍāya sakala
dāya sakalake sāmya jōḍi birā
ḍa suṁkasāmya ka ta
ḷadāya jōḍi rā
kāluve nīru neḍi
sahavāgi Ēnuṁṭudanū
sarvamāṁnyavāgi naṁma taṁ
de narasaṇanāyaka voḍērigelu naṁma
tāyi nāgāji Aṁmanavarigelu dha
rmavāgi sūryyagrahaṇa puṁṇya kā
ladalu Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi
naḍevamariyādeU dhāreneṟa
du samarpisteU yidharmake Ā
robaru tapidare taṁma taṁdetāyiga
ḷa vāraṇāsili koṁda pāpagaḷige
hōdavarū gōhatya pātakagaḷū bra
ṁhma hatya pātaka strī hatya pātaka
®ṇahatya pātakagaḷū modalā
gi Aśvīti modalāda mahāpāpakke
hōharu śrī kruṣṇarāyarū śrī vi
rūpākṣa dēvarige samarppisida nā
gābharaṇa 1 navaratnada tāmare kama
la 1 ciṁnada harivāṇa 1 ciṁnada
Ārati halage 2 beḷeya Āratiya
halageḥ yi Ābharaṇagaḷanu kruṣṇa rā
ya mahārāyarū namage dharṁmavāga bēkeṁdu samarppisidevu
Digital edition of SII 27.162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
